--- permalink: /blog/page-:page/ per_page: 2 query: path: "posts/*.md" order_by: date sort: desc --- page {{ pagination.current }}/{{ pagination.total }}|prev:{{ pagination.prev_url | default(value="-") }}|next:{{ pagination.next_url | default(value="-") }}|{% for item in pagination.items %}{{ item.title }} {% endfor %}
